heart_rate.note: Max/LTHR/RHR re-baselined by Garmin 265 (old Amazfit read max 179, LTHR 165, RHR 52). Do not mix old and new HR baselines.
heart_rate.status: PROVISIONAL - confirm via 30-min LTHR field test, Phase 2 week 1 (w/c 20 Jul)

marathon_goal.race_date_note: From plan v2 - confirm official race date and update here

fueling.marathon_target: 60-90g carbs/hr = one gel every 30-35 min (6-8 gels total)
fueling.training_rule: Full gel plan practised on every run >= 16km

environment.heat_effect: Feels-like >= 33C adds ~15-30 s/km and 5-8 bpm at easy effort
environment.treadmill_conversion: Treadmill ~15-20 s/km and ~5-8 bpm easier than outdoor Singapore; compare outdoor-to-outdoor only
environment.cool_windows: Start before 6:30am or after 6:30pm; heat reliably arrives 7:15-7:30am

conventions.grading_scale: A+ to C with +/- subgrades, per-metric (pace/HR/cadence) plus overall
conventions.long_run_grading: Controlled progression - Z2 to Z3 drift acceptable late in run; easy runs held to strict Z2
conventions.water_stops: Walk through, never pause the timer (keeps HR data honest)
conventions.zone_changes: Only via field test, never watch auto-detection
